office_does: A state representative writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: A civil-rights nonprofit leader emphasizing immigrant protections challenges an incumbent behavioral-health advocate with a legislative focus on treatment, gun-violence prevention, housing, and reproductive rights.

candidates.summary: Siddiqi is a civil-rights nonprofit leader and former small-business owner campaigning on affordability, immigrant protections, and resistance to federal overreach.
highlights: Brings civil-rights, nonprofit, corporate, and small-business experience [S2][S3]
Emphasizes immigrant and civil-rights protections and resistance to federal overreach [S2][S3]

experience.basis: He is a nonprofit and business outsider with no documented elected or legislative record.

immigration.basis: He explicitly emphasizes immigrant protections and resistance to federal overreach.

candidates.summary: Davis is an incumbent representative and behavioral-health advocate whose official work emphasizes treatment, gun-violence prevention, housing, and reproductive rights.
highlights: Brings incumbent legislative and addiction-treatment advocacy experience [S2]
Official work emphasizes addiction treatment, mental health, and gun-violence prevention [S2]
Supports housing affordability and reproductive rights [S2]

safety.basis: Her official work centers addiction treatment and mental-health responses alongside gun-violence prevention.

experience.basis: She is an incumbent representative with an official legislative record.

social.basis: Her official work emphasizes reproductive rights.
